query:
-- Parse speed tier from description for items that still have empty parsedSpeedTier
UPDATE billing_items SET parsedSpeedTier = CASE
  WHEN description REGEXP '250/25|250 Mbps' THEN '250/25'
  WHEN description REGEXP '100/40|100/20|100 Mbps' THEN '100/40'
  WHEN description REGEXP '50/20|50 Mbps' THEN '50/20'
  WHEN description REGEXP '25/10|25 Mbps' THEN '25/10'
  WHEN description REGEXP '12/1' THEN '12/1'
  ELSE parsedSpeedTier
END
WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied%' AND (parsedSpeedTier IS NULL OR parsedSpeedTier = '');

-- Check the result
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN parsedSpeedTier != '' AND parsedSpeedTier IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasSpeed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN parsedSpeedTier = '' OR parsedSpeedTier IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as noSpeed,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM billing_items WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied%';

UPDATE billing_items SET parsedSpeedTier = CASE
  WHEN description REGEXP '250/25|250 Mbps' THEN '250/25'
  WHEN description REGEXP '100/40|100/20|100 Mbps' THEN '100/40'
  WHEN description REGEXP '50/20|50 Mbps' THEN '50/20'
  WHEN description REGEXP '25/10|25 Mbps' THEN '25/10'
  WHEN description REGEXP '12/1' THEN '12/1'
  ELSE parsedSpeedTier
END
WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied%' AND (parsedSpeedTier IS NULL OR parsedSpeedTier = '');

-- Check the result
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN parsedSpeedTier != '' AND parsedSpeedTier IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasSpeed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN parsedSpeedTier = '' OR parsedSpeedTier IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as noSpeed,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM billing_items WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied%';
